narrative:
Union Township M (precinct in Clermont County) has 598 registered voters, with 59.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.2 percentage points.
